title: polypodium hyperboreum
intro: Polypodium hyperboreum, also known as the Arctic polypody, is a species of fern that is native to the Arctic regions of Asia and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium hyperboreum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Polypodium hyperboreum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
